title: Chapter 48
content:
Chapter 48: Chapter 48: Neko

’Then, what about the question mark?’

[The question mark is because it over this world limit.]

Over the world limit? Then why no tribulation lightning strikes her? Didn’t you said above origin spirit realm will invite heavenly tribulation lightning?

[It won’t come, Host. This is Heavenly White Tiger special ability, like phoenix can revive infinitely, Heavenly White Tiger the only being that heavens can’t do anything with, because it just absorbs the lightning that they sent down.]

’I see in the beast tamer memories, there is an information about Heavenly White Tiger, went around the world to interfere with someone else heavenly tribulation and absorb the lightning.’

Since the heaven won’t give its food to grow, it just takes it from someone else.

Now Damon, understand the situation, he looks at 100+ years old loli in his embrace and called Neko.

"Neko, you band with me just to eat my lightning?"

"Yes! But that not all, it’s been more than hundred years I stuck in that cage, I don’t have any memories aside being trap in that cage. Since you help out, I want to repay you, master." She explains to Damon.

"And there’s just something about your lightning that’s making me unable to take my eyes away and made my body shiver with excitement. So i just make a bond with you."

’I see, so that cage mess with her in everything, she can’t grow, her mental age stuck, and her trait didn’t help either, even though she should be and adult divine beast.’

"Anyway, you should go back to you cat form, I want walk around with a naked girl."

Neko nodded and transform back to her little cute white cat from and preach on Damon shoulder.

"I will buy you some clothes later."

"Meow." she meow but Damon can hear her voice in his mind.

"Okay." she let out the cute voice in his mind.

Then he walks out the cave to go back to Crimson Moon City.

****

Meanwhile, at the entrance of Fire valley that now barren because of the rumors that something strange happening in center area.

But a dozen of people still remains, they all at peak true spirit realm, and the leader is at first stage of earth spirit realm.

"Is the information correct? that pretty face still here?" one of them ask.

"Yes, Senior disciple Mio and Senior disciple Mia already back at the sect, so he’s alone." another one said.

"You know that Young Master Kai, will help you all to become core disciples, once you guys reach earth spirit realm." the leader said.

"By the way, senior brother? why Young Master Kai ask us to do this." one of the asks.

"You know that Young Master Kai is the strongest core disciple, right? once he reaches heavenly spirit realm, he will become elder and marry his fiancé, elder Selene." the leader explain to them.

"Ahh, I see now, yesterday I heard that elder Selene’s brother killed in a deathmatch, so now Young Master Kai, want to take revenge for his future brother-in-law and to impress elder Selene."

"Yes, you guys correct and you two know that Young Master Kai, fancy our famous twin core disciple, and plan to make them his concubine. Plus, the Frostborn family put a bounty on him, we can get double reward." the leader added.

"So, this gigolo mess with wrong people." one of the said

"Anyway, let’s go he just an eight stage of elementary realm, it will be and easy job, we can even beat him up first before killing him, hahahha"

"That sounds fun, ruining that pretty face, hahaha."

Then they enter fire valley.

****

Damon Walking through the fire valley, with Neko on his shoulder. He already at the exit of inner area.

Suddenly, Neko hissing at something. he also heard the system.

[Host, 13 people approaching 12 at Ninth Level of True Spirit Realm and one at First Level of Earth Spirit Realm.] after the system warning, 13 people appear 12 with the same robe as Damon but with gold trim instead of silver and on with the same robe as Mio and Mia.

They are inner and core disciples of azure dragon sect. Damon bowed and ask.

"Greeting senior brothers, what are you all doing here?"

Hearing Damon, the leader answers him.

"We, glad we found you junior brother, we were sent as rescue team by elder after seeing Senior sister Mio and Senior sister Mia come back to sect injured." the leader give Damon a smile, but fake one.

Hearing this Damon began to laugh. even they said that Damon could feel their leaking murderous aura and Neko voice keep resonating in his mind.

’Bad people!’ Neko said to Damon in his mind while keep hissing.

"Hahahah, Cut the crap, senior brothers, you all should try hide your murderous aura if you want to lie."

Hearing what Damon said their face change, they don’t bother hide their killing aura anymore.

"Well done, junior brother look like you not only have a nice face but also smart brain." The core disciple said.

"So, who sent you guys? The Frostborn family?" Damon asks.

"No, we are not, you mess with someone you can’t handle. We were sent by Young Master Kai, the Heir of Reventon Family, one of the most powerful noble in western continent."

’Young Master Kai, Who the fuck is that?’

Damon pretends to give a shock face like he was afraid to mess with a stronger family than the Frostborn family.

"Hahaha the shock on you face is good. Since you are going to die anyway, let me tell you, Young Master Kai Reventon is elder Selen’s fiancé. so, you kill his future brother-in-law and approach Young Master Kai future concubine." The leader tells Damon

"Future concubine, I don’t mess with anyone like that!" Damon said with his fake terrified face.

"It’s Senior sister Mio and Senior sister Mia, you gigolo, just because you have pretty face it doesn’t mean you can approach anyone." one of the inner disciples said.

"Anyway, since you already know, time to die. Kill him."

Then they lunge at Damon as his face change and his lips widen into a smirk.
